element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core movement and melee combat established immediately
Extended attack range introduced early, foundational for combat
Signature mechanic requiring charge timing; enables wall-bounce platforming
Resource management established; bananas provide superior recovery
One-hit mechanics introduce precision platforming challenge
Lava at stage entrance signals hazard escalation
Gameplay style shift mirrors Gradius; breaks platformer rhythm
Alternative control scheme for climactic encounter
Scattered rewards for exploration and completion

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platforming sections between enemy encounters
Completing stage sections before boss gates
Rocket attack cool-down windows for repositioning
typical_tension_triggers: Narrowing platform sections requiring precise rocket bounces
Scrolling shooter segments with multiple enemy waves
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating intensity peaks at boss gates; medium-pressure traversal between encounters; escalating hazard density through mid-game stages; final stages employ both platformer and shooter mechanics for variety

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: 1UP items and health pickups hidden in secondary paths; exploration encouraged but not required for progression
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Rocket attack wall-bounce sequences create hidden vertical shortcuts and out-of-order progression opportunities

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory Stage 1 teaches core mechanics (sword, projectile, charged rocket attack) in low-pressure environment with basic enemy encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 2-4 escalate hazard density and introduce instant-kill mechanics; gameplay style shifts with horizontal shooter sections; enemy attack patterns increase in complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stages 5-7 combine platformer and shooter sections; mech duel at Stage 5 boss; final confrontation with Pig Star Core requires mastery of all mechanics
notable_spikes: Stage 5 mech boss fight (control scheme change, significant difficulty jump)
Crazy Hard/Very Hard difficulty: one-hit defeats, no continues (extreme spike)

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear left-to-right traversal with enemy encounters, platform challenges, and health pickups; concludes with boss gate
Confined corridors with instant-kill obstacles (spikes, lava) requiring precise timing or rocket attack navigation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stage 2 (cart segment with spikes), Stage 3 (lava start)

notable_level_patterns.description: Side-scrolling shooter mechanics (Gradius-style) integrated into level progression; breaks platformer pacing
Each of 7 stages terminates with boss encounter; Stage 5 features mech robot control variant

sources_used: Wikipedia - Rocket Knight Adventures (Gameplay, Plot sections)
